text:
Nurse 
EXAMPLE 5: 

A patient who is confined to the bed has developed a small reddened area on the 
buttocks. The physician has ordered home health aide visits for more frequent 
repositioning, bathing and the application of a topical ointment and a gauze 4x4. Home 
health aide visits at an appropriate frequency would be reasonable and necessary. 

C. Assistance With Medications Which Are Ordinarily Self-Administered and Do 
Not Require the Skills of a Licensed Nurse to Be Provided Safely and
